description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, rectangular footprint and a spacious, landscaped backyard. The front includes a driveway leading to a detached garage, flanked by a row of trees and a small parking area. The central building is surrounded by manicured gardens, a patio area, and a swimming pool, with additional green spaces and outdoor seating visible. The roof is flat, and the structure is characterized by large windows and clean, geometric lines. The backyard is lush with trees and shrubs, and there is a distinct separation between the main house and the garage. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, detached garage, landscaped gardens, and a swimming pool, featuring large windows and open outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, detached garage, main entrance, and a row of trees lining the approach.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the bungalow, the garage on the left, and the backyard with a pool and garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, lush greenery, and the back patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, outdoor seating area, and the expanse of the landscaped backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
